object_a.label: stairs
object_a.description: Carpeted staircase ascending to the right with visible treads
object_a.long_form_open_description: A short flight of carpeted stairs (several risers visible) turning upward to the right. Treads covered in the same beige carpet as the landing; risers are white or light-colored. Stairs attach to the wall on the left and the banister on the right.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Rises from the landing to the right of the image; picture frames are mounted on the wall beside the stair run
object_a.object_text_short: Carpeted staircase ascending to the right with visible treads
object_a.object_text_long: right sector | A short flight of carpeted stairs (several risers visible) turning upward to the right. Treads covered in the same beige carpet as the landing; risers are white or light-colored. Stairs attach to the wall on the left and the banister on the right.

object_b.label: window
object_b.description: double window with blinds and light curtains on right wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A set of windows on the right wall with white blinds partially open and light-colored drapery panels on either side; they provide natural light into the living room from the right side.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Situated to the right of the recliner and fireplace, allowing light onto that seating area
